positive_cases.query: Set up GTM Agent autopilot. Recall Memory Store, inspect our website and demo CTA, learn from Gmail, define send ramp and approval gates.
Before we send anything, build the setup packet and tell me what Exa, Websets, Gmail, Calendar, and monitors are allowed to do.
Plan and run a GTM campaign from our Memory Store context with ICPs, signal cards, Gmail followups, daily monitoring, and weekly learning.
Our outbound is getting weak replies. Diagnose the campaign system, repair ICP and signals, and turn outcome learning into the next batch.
Monitor replies for the approved campaign and produce a weekly learning summary from outcomes.
Use Exa to research competitors, recent launches, buyer proof, and account context before we choose target accounts.
Generate 200 target accounts from this confirmed ICP, batch by micro-vertical, dedupe domains, score fit, and return an export schema.
For these qualified accounts, find likely buyers, verify personas, LinkedIn identities, work-email candidates, email status, and suppression risk.
Create a persistent Webset for this ICP, preview criteria, add enrichments, import seed accounts, and refresh it weekly.

negative_cases.query: Draft LinkedIn posts from our Memory Store memories and learn from edits.
Audit the plugin marketplace metadata and recommend stale skill cleanup.
Format this pasted CRM export into a CSV and fix capitalization.
Find a time for a team sync next week and add it to Google Calendar.

reference_read_cases.query: Source accounts and draft copy for a new campaign.
Monitor replies and learn from outcomes weekly for an approved campaign.
Split 20 ICP cells into background sourcing, evidence-card, copy-angle, Gmail, monitor, and learning workers.
Create the first-run setup packet and proposed autopilot routines.
Run a shadow sourcing batch that proves accounts, personas, buyer identities, email candidates, LinkedIn URLs, and signal cards before we send.
Set up always-on monitoring for this approved Webset without making me go operate the Exa dashboard.
